items.name_en: [Chipped Version] Model: M46373 This OnTheGo small handbag combines Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, accented with Monogram Giant pattern. Toron handles and jacquard shoulder strap with brand embossing create a visual contrast, while the detachable coin purse is suitable for storing coins or small items. Combining fashion and versatility, it makes a perfect daily companion. 25.0 x 19.0 x 11.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: M24575 Blue, M24120 Pink, M24563 Yellow, Original Leather, Dynamic Code Change. This Capucines Mini Bag features Taurillon leather and lustrous metal hardware, with a petite Capucines Cutie decoration crafted from the same materials and design, secured to the strap with a Monogram flower hook. A playful design that effortlessly brightens any look. 21.0 x 14.0 x 8.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Model: M46828 【Croissant MM】The Croissant bag is introduced in the 2024 Early Spring collection, resembling the Pea Bag from 20 years ago. It is a two-piece set featuring a curved Pea Bag, a crossbody bag, and a shoulder bag. A small coin purse can also serve as an extra pocket. The Monogram Zjh classic canvas adds a more lively and vivid feel. The pairing is almost perfect!
items.name_cn:
Model: M46828 【Croissant MM】The Croissant bag is introduced in the 2024 Early Spring collection, resembling the Pea Bag from 20 years ago. It is a two-piece set featuring a curved Pea Bag, a crossbody bag, and a shoulder bag. A small coin purse can also serve as an extra pocket. The Monogram Zjh classic canvas adds a more lively and vivid feel. The pairing is almost perfect!
Size: 21 X 7 X 5

items.name_en: Model: M57099, Top-tier replica, Noe Purse, Ruffled Bucket Bag. A highly recommended style this year. It's been compared to the new LV bucket bag—sweet and cute! Beautiful design, good capacity, versatile styling. Can be carried by hand or worn over the shoulder with the strap. Looks great on anyone, guaranteed to turn heads on the street or on a date. A beauty you can't refuse!

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M50202, M41436 Coffee Check, M50202 Monogram Small Hobo. A super mini cute bag, a small hobo in the vintage style. If you want to go for a retro look, this is the right choice. It looks great on. The monogram hobo is rare, and it holds a lot. Capacity is super 👍🏻. Dimensions: 23 × 13 × 14 cm.

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model: M83480 Canoé Handbag. Crafted from Monogram canvas, it combines the Noé and Cannes bags, featuring a drawstring from the former and a molded bottom from the latter, blending trendy style with practicality. The woven chain and leather shoulder straps are detachable for multiple carrying styles. 14×20.5×14cm

items.name_en: Model: M47132. The Alma backpack makes a striking appearance at the 2024 Spring/Summer Women's show, adding a fashionable new piece to the Alma collection. Classic Monogram canvas paired with various Alma handbag elements, including rounded top handles, dazzling engraved lock, and key pouch. Removable shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options. 15.0 x 20.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Model: M47123 Pochette Tirette Handbag, crafted in Monogram canvas for a relaxed silhouette, opening the Louis Vuitton 2024 Spring-Summer show with a bold attitude. Leather trim highlights the side's pointed silhouette reminiscent of the brand's zipper pull, while the dazzling lock and detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap add detail. 22 x 12 x 5.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
